haftalar.kazanim: E8.1.1 — Qualities of a good friend
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss friendship values and qualities using adjectives.
Students role-play social situations involving making and maintaining friendships.
Students discuss common teenage challenges and how to deal with them.
Students use modal verbs to ask for and give permission.
Students read and write simple recipes using imperative forms.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.3.2 — Expressing preferences and explaining reasons
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss food preferences and explain reasons for their choices.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.4.1 — Digital communication and social media
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss online communication and its advantages and disadvantages.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.4.2 — Present perfect: for and since
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use present perfect with for/since to describe ongoing situations.
Students discuss wildlife conservation using passive voice and modals.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.5.2 — Relative clauses and complex sentences
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use defining and non-defining relative clauses.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.6.1 — Natural disasters and emergency procedures
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss natural disasters and describe emergency procedures.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.6.2 — Past continuous and past simple
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use past continuous alongside past simple to describe events.
Students discuss tourist destinations and plan a trip.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.7.2 — Asking for and giving information
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students ask about and describe tourist attractions and activities.
Students discuss the role of sport in maintaining a healthy lifestyle.
Students use must/should to give advice about health and fitness.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.9.1 — Scientific achievements and future technology
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss past and future scientific developments.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.9.2 — Future forms: will, going to, might
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use different future forms to discuss technological developments.
Students discuss environmental problems and propose solutions.

haftalar.kazanim: E8.10.2 — Third conditional and mixed conditionals
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use conditionals to discuss past decisions and their consequences.
